name: omnimind-v03
description: OmniMind AI Agent System - Full Stack Application

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace=backend && npm run lint:fix --workspace=frontend
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=backend && npm run format --workspace=frontend
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace=backend && npm run clean --workspace=frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=backend && npm install --workspace=frontend
scripts.reset: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules && npm install
